description: If you want a bag that is funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this grey backpack from nike. Carry it to college work or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with a laptop compartment and loads of space, it can become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome ruggedly handsome backpack! MeasurementHeight: 47 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 24 cmCapacity: 25 litresMade of 100% polyester outer with 100% nylon lining for enhanced durability and styleOne main roomy zippered compartment with a padded laptop sleeve and velcro fastening Zippered pouch on the front with organiser sleeves for your mobile and essentialsA small zippered compartment on the top right corner for added spaceBrand badge appliquéd on the front and backHaul loop at the top for ease of carryingPadded, adjustable shoulders straps with mesh lining, engineered with Sport Fit System technology to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenlyMesh panels on the back using the Sport Fit System technology for improved comfort and ventilationErgonomic design to fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
